title: cyclosorus multiauriculatus
intro: Cyclosorus multiauriculatus, also known as the multi-auriculated cyclosorus, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its distinctive leaflets with multiple auricles. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus multiauriculatus are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this fern can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using it as a decoction to create a tea, which can be consumed for its therapeutic benefits.
